commands.review_summary:
The branch changes `getDefaultSessionDir` to percent-encode cwd path separators and adds a `continueRecent` header-cwd mismatch guard.

PR surface: Source +16. Total +16 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source still maps the example cwd pair to the same default session directory and `continueRecent` opens the newest valid file without matching `header.cwd`; I did not run artifact-writing tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the PR has compatibility findings, missing contributor proof, and competing open candidate fixes rather than a narrow automation-only repair.
